revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q10777837)
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23455888809|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Harvard_citation_text%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Harvard_citation_text%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{documentation subpage}}
{{tsh|harvtxt}}
{{lua|Module:Footnotes}}
{{high-use|4600}}
Template '''harvtxt''' creates a short [[WP:Harvard reference|author–date citation]] with a one-directional link to the first matching citation template on the same page.

{{Harvard citation documentation|harvtxt}}

<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
[[es:Plantilla:Harvtxt]]
[[it:Template:Harvtxt]]
[[ja:Template:Harvtxt]]
[[sl:Predloga:Harvard citation text]]
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"1": {},
		"2": {},
		"3": {},
		"4": {},
		"5": {},
		"p": {
			"aliases": [
				"page"
			],
			"label": "Page",
			"type": "number"
		},
		"pp": {
			"aliases": [
				"pages"
			],
			"label": "Pages"
		},
		"loc": {
			"aliases": [
				"at"
			]
		},
		"ref": {},
		"Ref": {}
	},
	"description": "Creates a short author–date citation with a one-directional link to the first matching citation template on the same page.",
	"format": "inline"
}
</templatedata>
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>{{wikidata link|Q10777837}}
[[Category:Author–date citation templates]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: consolidate 4 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Harvard_citation_text%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{documentation subpage}}
{{tsh|harvtxt}}
{{lua|Module:Footnotes}}
{{high-use|4600}}
Template '''harvtxt''' creates a short [[WP:Harvard reference|author–date citation]] with a one-directional link to the first matching citation template on the same page.

{{Harvard citation documentation|harvtxt}}

<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"1": {},
		"2": {},
		"3": {},
		"4": {},
		"5": {},
		"p": {
			"aliases": [
				"page"
			],
			"label": "Page",
			"type": "number"
		},
		"pp": {
			"aliases": [
				"pages"
			],
			"label": "Pages"
		},
		"loc": {
			"aliases": [
				"at"
			]
		},
		"ref": {},
		"Ref": {}
	},
	"description": "Creates a short author–date citation with a one-directional link to the first matching citation template on the same page.",
	"format": "inline"
}
</templatedata>
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>{{wikidata link|Q10777837|es|Plantilla:Harvtxt|it|Template:Harvtxt|ja|Template:Harvtxt|sl|Predloga:Harvard citation text}}
[[Category:Author–date citation templates]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
